purpose: Mk.X T10-13 ossification dormant 상태 unlock을 위한 G1-G4 gates fire criteria pre-register. raw#12 frozen 2026-04-25. 본 spec은 Mk.X engine_design (2026-04-19) §3의 narrative criteria를 measurable predicate로 변환.
auto_fire_predicate: G1 AND G2 AND G3 AND G4 (all four must PASS simultaneously in same epoch)

G1.name: P4 saturation verdict
G1.measurable_predicate: exists 3 consecutive iters in P4 sweep where domain saturation = TRUE AND tier_10_plus_absorption_count = 0
G1.current_status: UNKNOWN — P4 sweep status not measured this cycle, requires separate cycle to evaluate

G2.name: tier-10 seed exhaustion
G2.narrative: P4 D8–D13 (anima-eeg/physics/body/speak/engines/tools) all report saturation with tier 10+ seeds
G2.measurable_predicate: for each domain in {D8: anima-eeg, D9: physics, D10: body, D11: speak, D12: engines, D13: tools}: tier_10_seed_attempts >= N_min AND new_atoms_added == 0
G2.current_status: UNKNOWN — domain-level tier-10 seed status not aggregated

G3.name: twin-engine drill fail
G3.narrative: anima ↔ nexus coupled drill (P4 iter 75 evolution_twin_drill) yields 0 new atoms
G3.measurable_predicate: evolution_twin_drill iter 75 result.new_atom_count == 0 AND nexus_delta_1_1_witness_count >= 1 (consciousness-side Mk.X consumes Δ¹₁ witnesses via G3 only)
G3.current_status: UNKNOWN — twin drill not run this cycle

G4.name: user sign-off (ratification)
G4.narrative: explicit ratification per feedback_all_preapproved_roadmap_only — Mk.X launch is roadmap step, pre-approved; sign-off = confirming G1-G3 are met, not choice
G4.measurable_predicate: user_signoff_record exists with timestamp >= G1_pass_ts AND G2_pass_ts AND G3_pass_ts; signoff confirms 'G1-G3 met, not arbitrary choice'
G4.current_status: NOT_REQUESTED — G1-G3 not yet evaluated, signoff request premature

auto_fire_sequence_post_G1_G4_PASS: run self-check training/mk10_selftest.hexa on 82-atom foundation (must reproduce Mk.IX output bit-for-bit on slots 0-7; slots 8-15 zeros)
run P4 seeds once more on Mk.X; record absorption delta
abort_conditions: self-check bit-diff on slots 0-7 → revert, Mk.X forbidden that epoch
per-round RSS > 6 GiB → slot-width backoff to 12, re-self-check
> 0 Π₀² regression (Mk.X reports fewer Π₀² than Mk.IX) → revert
out_of_scope_for_consciousness_side_Mk_X: nexus atlas-side [13*] promotion (nexus-side Mk.X, different engine family)

cross_repo_separation.anima_consciousness_side: 본 spec — V0~V_pairrank, T10-13 atoms 위에 ossification
cross_repo_separation.communication_channel: G3 (Δ¹₁ witnesses one-way: nexus → anima consume)

decision_priority_post_prereg: P1: G1 evaluation — P4 sweep saturation status 측정 (anima cycle 필요)
P2: G2 evaluation — domain-level (D8-D13) tier-10 seed attempts 측정
P3: G3 evaluation — twin drill P4 iter 75 결과 + nexus Δ¹₁ witness 수신 확인
P4: G1-G3 PASS 시 G4 signoff request to user
P5: All gates PASS 시 auto-fire sequence 실행 (GPU 비용 큼)

raw_compliance.raw_10_no_overclaim: satisfied — gates 모두 UNKNOWN/NOT_REQUESTED 명시, 측정 미실시 명시, fire 미발생 확정
raw_compliance.raw_12_cherry_pick_proof: satisfied — gate predicates frozen 2026-04-25, post-hoc tuning 금지. measurement는 별도 cycle.
raw_compliance.raw_15_ssot: this file = SSOT for Mk.X G1-G4 gate criteria
raw_compliance.raw_37_38_omega_saturation_cycle: design (mk_x_engine_design_20260419.md §3 + this prereg) → impl (this state SSOT) → fixpoint marker
